creator: sylvio@FreeBSD.org
text:
Ok, have a new version to port, 1.0.3, I am always working it.


Em 16/02/2010, =E0s 06:48, Oleg Sidorkin escreveu:

>> Hi,
>>=20
>> Please, fix this error:
>>=20
>> http://people.freebsd.org/~sylvio/kmymoney2-1.0.2.log
>>=20
>> Thanks.
>=20
> Hi,
>=20
> It seems that patch was not applied clean but I cannot identify the =
cause of=20
> the problem (was it diff or port itself).
>=20
> Here is my version of the patched port I've build kmymoney-1.0.2 from:
> http://komanda.troitsk.ws/kmymoney2.tar.gz
>=20
> files/patch-ab fixes the command failed according to the log
>=20
> Thanks.
